videos.headline: Eliah Drinkwitz on No. 16 Mizzou's mindset and heart after win vs. Auburn
videos.description: A proud Drinkwitz raves about Missouri's heart and the motivation from the loss to Alabama last week while praising the defense for their unbelievable effort.
